mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) AS LIST_CNT FROM (SELECT A1.SITE_ID FROM ARMSITE A1 WHERE A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A'
AND A1.SITE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND A1.DOMAIN_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
) A0
SELECT A1.SITE_ID , A1.SITE_NM , A1.SITE_DESC , A1.DOMAIN_NM , A1.TMPLAT_CODE , A1.META_INFO , COALESCE(A1.SEED_KEY, '') AS SEED_KEY FROM ARMSITE A1 WHERE A1.SITE_ID = #{siteId}
SELECT A1.SITE_ID , A1.SITE_NM , A1.DOMAIN_NM FROM ARMSITE A1 WHERE A1.STTUS_CODE = 'A' ORDER BY A1.SITE_ID
